notes: Adopted from template v1.0.0 -> v1.8.0 in a single parity pass.
Constitution upgraded to schemaVersion 2 / v2.2.0 with structured rules, rationale, and new articles.
Template manifest upgraded to v1.8.0 with full version history notes.
Added observability-logging.md and repository-security-hooks.md shared instructions.
Hook coverage aligned with the template for curated PII, env leak scanning, and ggshield while preserving scripts/ as the implementation surface.
Added the template's dedicated Gitleaks and Semgrep GitHub Actions workflows for CI-side secret and configuration analysis.
Added the template's GGShield audit workflow, repo-owned .gitleaks.toml baseline, local pre-push Gitleaks and Semgrep hooks, and CI replay of the security pre-push policy.
localDeviations: Hook implementations remain under scripts/ and are orchestrated by .pre-commit-config.yaml rather than hooks/.
instructions/ remains the checked-in runtime instruction catalog; .instructions/ is reserved for repo-local guidance.
The Node entry point sync-constitution.cjs remains the source implementation, with scripts/sync-constitution.ps1 as the template-compatible wrapper.

The precommit.yml workflow replays the dedicated security pre-push hooks directly; the existing repo-local slow pre-push suite remains enforced by its own workflow surfaces rather than being replayed inside precommit.yml.
